title: Not everyone’s on board with cutting industrial AI rules
summary_full: Safety groups warn of risk of 'significantly' weakening the EU’s AI Act, while a carve-out for industrial uses could derail high risk AI standards-writing, others suggest
summary_public: Safety groups warn of risk of 'significantly' weakening the EU’s AI Act, while a carve-out for industrial uses could derail high risk AI standards-writing, others suggest
